notes: No wall-clock thresholds are used as pass/fail criteria.
Metrics are derived from call counts and persisted-update counts asserted by integration tests in test/session/prompt-loop-perf.test.ts.

scenarios.test: perf proxy: warm prompt-loop cache avoids redundant full history rebuild
scenarios.evidence: Initial history load occurs once; subsequent loop step uses delta path instead of another full compacted-history rebuild.

scenarios.test: perf proxy: tool streaming coalescer reduces persisted tool updates
scenarios.evidence: Coalescing suppresses one-write-per-delta behavior for tool input streaming; persisted tool updates stay below raw delta chunk count.
